Match setup

Standard night is 16 points. Singles = 1 point. Doubles = 1 team point, shown as two linked player rows with the same game number. The partner row does not reduce the 16-point total.

Game list
How doubles works: choose “Double” on a game row. A linked partner row is inserted under it with the same game number and red highlight. The following games automatically renumber. A doubles win gives the team 1 point and gives each player 0.5 in the player stats.
